entry.title: Re: How to implement custom S/4HANA pricing procedure in...
entry.content:
Hello,

little bit late for the original question, but google will show this thread a long time...

The VOFM-requirements and formulas are replaced by BAdI-Calls, have a look at SAP-help/Cloud:

Home - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Sales - Order and Contract Management - Price Management - Extensibility for Pricing - Custom Logic: Condition Amount

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Pricing Determination in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise System
entry.content:
Hello,

little bit late for the original question, but google will show this thread a long time...

The VOFM-requirements and formulas are replaced by BAdI-Calls, have a look at SAP-help/Cloud:

Home - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Sales - Order and Contract Management - Price Management - Extensibility for Pricing - Custom Logic: Condition Amount

Best regards

entry.title: Mandatory Fields for CSV Import
entry.content:
Hello,

When importing data via "Import Employee Data" transaction, is there a way to manage which columns for the CSV file are mandatory for the import or not?

Kind regards,
A.

entry.title: Re: All That You Can't Leave Behind - Preparing for SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025
entry.content: I was never asked by a customer to set up the Version Management System with Subversion, but it's worth noting that BI 2025 no longer includes Subversion. Customers must either build their own Subversion environment or integrate with Git, which is the current poster child of version control. There's a utility provided in the BI 2025 installer collaterals folder and this helpful how-to article, Migration from Subversion to Git in SAP Business Objects (BOE) – BI2025 Release by @HariPrasadChennamadhavuni.

entry.title: Re: Modeling a basic Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@utpal1pandya to be sure can you redeploy the Analytic Model to make sure all underlying changes are taken into account?

Otherwise, I'm not sure that local tables classified as dimension and fact table are enough. You might have to wrap these tables with a view first and apply the semantics there.

entry.title: Re: RFFOAVIS_FPAYM payment advice print preview and spool...
entry.content: Another possibility is adding your generic mailaddress of the AP department in de BCC of the original email in BTE 2040.

entry.title: can we assign a team goal within different goal plans?
entry.content:
The manager is assigned to Goal Plan X, while the direct report belongs to Goal Plan Y.

Can the manager assign a team goal to the reportee in this case, given that they are part of different goal plans?

I understand that the cascade function only works within a single goal plan, but I would like to understand how the team goal functionality behaves in this scenario.

Please help.

entry.title: Re: Bootcamp SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP Future Talent | Spanish
entry.content:
Estimados, buenos días. 

Por parte de UNTREF quisiéramos consultar si se trata de un Bootcamp dirigido a docentes o a estudiantes o bien, a ambos. Además, nos gustaría saber si hay algún límite o tope de inscripciones por institución. 

Quedamos pendientes. Saludos.

entry.title: Re: Empowering Through Learning: Sandra’s Path to SAP Champion
entry.content:
@Sandra_Solis It was an absolute pleasure to speak with you. You're an inspiration! Best of luck with all your exciting new endeavours. 

Michelle

entry.title: Publish to Multiple Non Recurring Pay components from Variable Pay template
entry.content: We have a requirement if it is possible to publish to Multiple Non Recurring pay components, As of now i could think of manual option to may be update the PCP code in XML and publish based on filters, but It looks much of work, is there any other effective way to do so?

entry.title: Re: Bootcamp SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP Future Talent | Spanish
entry.content: Gracias por el interés 😊 El Bootcamp está dirigido principalmente a principiantes, por lo que está pensado especialmente para estudiantes. Sin embargo, si docentes desean participar, ¡también son muy bienvenidos! Además, no hay límite de inscripciones por institución, así que pueden participar todos los que tengan interés.

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Portal as a Content Provider to SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Michal,

Please let me know how we can Integrate the applicatin of CRM, BW, ECC systems in the BTP without using the Enterprise Portal. We want to remove the Enterprise portal and integrate all the application in BTP.

Regards,

Rohit Gera

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere is coming! Controlled release i
entry.content:
Hello,

what remains unclear to me is who is going to take care of these requirements:

Prerequisites apply:

  1. SAP Analytics Cloud running on HANA Cloud
  2. SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere are located in the same data center. SAP datacenters are not in scope

In our case, the provisioning was done by SAP. Will SAP also take care of these requirements?

entry.title: Re: No goods receipt date in LS24 after stock transfer be...
entry.content:
Hello @floydaus 

Whether GR date is updated in a quant or not is defined in the WM movement configuration:

Check the configuration of the WM movement used for receipt in the plant B.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: SAP LeanIX and Enterprise Architecture at Sapphire in Orlando and Madrid
entry.content:
SAP LeanIX is a mission-critical enterprise architecture solution focused on business transformation.  Along with SAP Signavio and WalkMe, it plays a key role in helping businesses establish a transformation capability.

If you are going to Sapphire, there’s a lot you can learn about LeanIX’s capabilities and how companies use LeanIX to transform their enterprise architecture and their business.

Sessions to check out

SAP LeanIX: Our road map to power transformation and connect IT to business

If you are already a LeanIX customer or just curious, this session will highlight what we’re working on and what the future holds. From IT cost optimization and architecture decision-management, to strategic IT skills planning and business transformation, we’ll share the innovations we're investing in to empower enterprise architects and CIOs.

Orlando | Madrid​

Boost IT efficiency with cost transparency into your application landscape

In this session, you will hear from Bell Canada and discover how LeanIX helps drive data-backed conversations with the CFO and other financial managers by offering full IT cost visibility. As a result, you and your team can make more informed decisions about application rationalization and technology investments.

Orlando

Driving enterprise-wide application portfolio management with SAP LeanIX

Find out how Nokia has implemented SAP LeanIX solutions and transformed enterprise application portfolio management while supporting a range of acquisition and strategic initiatives, including disaster recovery and business continuity.

Madrid

From business strategy to IT execution with SAP Signavio and SAP LeanIX

Learn how the integrated product vision for the SAP Signavio and SAP LeanIX solutions empowers your organization to break down silos across the transformation journey, accelerating time-to-value-identification and value realization.

Orlando

Business transformation through architecture excellence with SAP LeanIX

This session will show you how Regeneron has advanced architecture practices to drive business transformation and enable increased transparency into their IT portfolio. Discover how a robust architecture practice elevates organization-wide success.

Orlando

Establishing Tokio Marine’s architecture practice with SAP LeanIX solutions

The Tokio Marine group of companies adopted LeanIX globally. In these session, they will describe how use LeanIX to drive collaboration and discovery across strategy, architecture, and implementation.

Orlando

Looking to learn more?

Business transformation management will be front and center at Sapphire.

You can learn more about the sessions devoted to business transformation here.

If you would like to see LeanIX in action, you can visit our Demo Stations or set up time to speak with someone 1-on-1 in the Experience Center.

See you at Sapphire!

Photo by Alexandre Schrammel on Unsplash

entry.title: Re: 🚀 SAP Green Token: Goodbye Blockchain, Hello Faster and More Efficient Auditability
entry.content: A positive evolution, this removal will cause fewer energy and ressource consuming transactions. And maybe good that this path was tried, as some lessons were learnt.

entry.title: SAP APIM external Logging using New Relic
entry.content:
In this blog, we'll dive into using Newrelic as an external logging server. Logging requests and responses is simple, and I'll guide you through logging all proxy exceptions to the Newrelic server.

I have used rest api call for sending the logs to new relic similar to https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/splunk-part-1-sap-apim-logging-monitoring/ba-p/13444151

You can check here for payload format and limitations https://docs.newrelic.com/docs/logs/log-api/introduction-log-api/

Newrelic trial account setup
You can create new relic account here.https://newrelic.com/

Create an application key

Copy your and check the logging functionality by testing from postman. Url is different for US and EU. I am using EU url. 

https://docs.newrelic.com/docs/logs/log-api/introduction-log-api/

Curl 

curl --location 'https://log-api.eu.newrelic.com/log/v1' \
--header 'Api-Key: YourKey' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
    "message": "Postman Testing",
    "Proxyname": "SAP SCN Blogs",
    "level": "Error"
}'

 

Message in Relic logs. Filter the mesasges logs based on the timeline. New Relic account setup is done and next is to send the logs from api proxy. 

 

API Proxy Configuration 

For demonstration purposes, we will log only when there is an error during proxy execution. To achieve this, the policies are placed within the FaultRule. No condition is specified in the FaultRule, ensuring that the policies are triggered for all errors. Placing the policies inside the FaultRule allows us to perform specific actions when an exception occurs.

API has one policy in the pre flow that is verify API key. During testing we will try to call the API without API key to produce exception. 

Faultrule
Two policies are created for sending the logs to Relic. You can attach these policies to any flow and delete it so that policies can be used only in faultrule. Make sure continueOnError="true" is set. 

  1. Js script to format the log paylod. 
<!-- this policy allows us to execute java script code during execution of an API Proxy -->
<Javascript async="false" continueOnError="true" enabled="true" timeLimit="200" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<!-- contains reference to any library scripts that help the main code file -->

	<!-- contains the name of the main code file -->
	<ResourceURL>jsc://generateLoggingPayload.js</ResourceURL>
</Javascript> ​
var error_content = context.getVariable("error.content");
var proxy_name = context.getVariable("apiproxy.name");
var messageid = context.getVariable("messageid");
var response_content = context.getVariable("response.content");
var response_code = context.getVariable("error.status.code");
var request_method = context.getVariable("request.verb");
var state = context.getVariable("error.state");
var proxy_url = context.getVariable("request.uri");
var target_url = context.getVariable("request.url");
//
// Build the payload with the stringified input
var payload = {
    
   "message": proxy_name,
    "level": "Error",
    "error_content" : error_content,
    "messageid" : messageid,
    "response_content" : response_content,
    "response_code" : response_code,
    "method": request_method,
    "state":state,
    "proxy_url": proxy_url,
    "target_url" : target_url
    
};

// Set the stringified payload for New Relic
context.setVariable("newRelicPayload", JSON.stringify(payload));
  • ServiceCallout to make http api all to post payload
<!-- this policy lets you call to an external service from your API flow -->
<ServiceCallout async="true" continueOnError="true" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	<!-- The request that gets sent from the API proxy flow to the external service -->
<Request clearPayload="false" variable="newRelicRequest">
        <Set>
            <Headers>
                <Header name="X-License-Key">Your-API-Key</Header>
                <Header name="Content-Type">application/json</Header>
            </Headers>
         
           <Payload contentType="application/json">{newRelicPayload}</Payload>
            <Verb>POST</Verb>
        </Set>
    </Request>
    <Response>newRelicResponse</Response>
    <HTTPTargetConnection>
        <URL>https://log-api.eu.newrelic.com/log/v1</URL>
    </HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>

Next we have to attach these two policies in the fault rule

Unfortunately, we cannot attach any policy to a FaultRule using the UI. To add policies to a FaultRule manually, please follow the instructions provided in this blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/sap-api-management-handling-faults-using-faultrules-and-defaultfaultrule/ba-p/13423702

We need to download proxy and unzip and edit the Proxyendpoint and Proxytargeendpoint xmls. 

 

ProxyEndpoint

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ProxyEndPoint default="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <name>default</name>
    <base_path>/nortwind/Products</base_path>
    <properties/>
    <routeRules>
        <routeRule>
            <name>default</name>
            <targetEndPointName>default</targetEndPointName>
            <sequence>1</sequence>
            <faultRules/>
        </routeRule>
    </routeRules>
    <faultRules>
        <faultRule>
            <name>LogErrors</name>
            <condition></condition>
            <steps>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>generateLoggingPayload</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>1</sequence>
                </step>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>sendLogsRelic</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>2</sequence>
                </step>
            </steps>
        </faultRule>
    </faultRules>
    <preFlow>
        <name>PreFlow</name>
        <request>
            <isRequest>true</isRequest>
            <steps>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>verifyAPIKey</policy_name>
                    <condition></condition>
                    <sequence>1</sequence>
                </step>
            </steps>
        </request>
    </preFlow>
    <postFlow>
        <name>PostFlow</name>
    </postFlow>
    <conditionalFlows/>
</ProxyEndPoint>

TargetEndPoint xml configuration.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<TargetEndPoint xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <name>default</name>
    <url>https://services.odata.org/northwind/northwind.svc/Productss</url>
    <provider_id>NONE</provider_id>
    <additionalAPIProviders/>
    <isDefault>true</isDefault>
    <properties/>
    <faultRules>
        <faultRule>
            <name>LogErrors</name>
            <condition></condition>
            <steps>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>sendLogsRelic</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>2</sequence>
                </step>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>generateLoggingPayload</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>1</sequence>
                </step>
            </steps>
        </faultRule>
    </faultRules>
    <preFlow>
        <name>PreFlow</name>
        <request>
            <isRequest>true</isRequest>
            <steps/>
        </request>
    </preFlow>
    <postFlow>
        <name>PostFlow</name>
    </postFlow>
    <conditionalFlows/>
    <loadBalancerConfigurations>
        <isRetry>false</isRetry>
        <healthMonitor>
            <isEnabled>false</isEnabled>
        </healthMonitor>
    </loadBalancerConfigurations>
</TargetEndPoint>

 

If you are using mac or linux, use this command for zipping the proxy. https://docs.apigee.com/api-platform/reference/api-proxy-configuration-reference

zip my-new-proxy.zip -r .

After making the necessary changes, compress the files into a ZIP archive and re-import them into the proxy.


Testing

APIProxyEndpointError

Send reqeust without Api key to produce APIProxyend errors. 

 

Logs

APITargetEndpointError

add wrong url to produce proxy endpoint errors. 

 

 

 


You can try out this approach and check if this can fulfil into your needs. 

Also, if you look closely at the error details, the error appears in SAP API Management and is also available on the client side. If the client system is already logging the errors, then there's no need to perform logging in API Management, as it would be a duplication of effort. So avoid duplicate logging. 

Relic has limitations regarding payload size; therefore, it's important to consider this when sending request and response payloads



References

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-api-management/sap-api-management/variable-references?version=Cloud

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content: Hi Lakshmi, you can come to the venue. I will send the confirmation mail in some time.

entry.title: Re: Connectors other than JCo??
entry.content: I want to use 1), but I'm unable to integrate sapjco.jar (3.1.11) in a MAVEN built Java rich client application.

entry.title: Re: Transformation logic for SCD Type 2 in Datasphere
entry.content: This link is not very helpful. It only shows how to create Dimension table and the fact table and some input parameter and association. I wanted to find out where exactly we configure SCD type 2 which is not shown in the document. Thanks

entry.title: Is Office 365 Web Version compatible with the SAP GUI (8.0)
entry.content:
Hello together,

I have a question about SAP GUI <> Office Integration.
Is Office 365 Web Version compatible with the SAP GUI (8.0) 64Bit?

Best regards
Almin

entry.title: Re: HOW TAX CODE IS DEFINED AND ASSIGNED IN SD?
entry.content: The tax rate comes from the rates maintained in the FTXP tcode, however if a tax rate is changed in FTXP the system will still consider the old tax rate until its changed in VK12. So if a tax rate needs to be changed then it needs to be updated both in the FTXP & also in VK12.

entry.title: Re: RFFOAVIS_FPAYM payment advice print preview and spool...
entry.content: Generally speaking the copying of standard SAP programs is a terrible idea and should be avoided entirely.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects, resource management a brief introduction
entry.content:
Hi,

what is the scope item that cover SAPS/4 HANA Cloud for Projects and Resource Management and how i can activate it.

entry.title: Empty parameters after saving JSON for binding creation (CALM API / LeanIX)
entry.content:
Hi there, tried to update an initialy empty configured JSON for CALM API with instance creation while trying to setup the binding for CALM in BTP and LeanIX, which I had to use in LeanIX then. Loading it from a saved file  or copying it from a text

{

  "xs-security": {

    "xsappname": "sap-cloud-alm-api",

    "authorities": [

      "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.landscape.read",

      "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.subscriptions.read",

      "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.projects.read",

      "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.projects.write",

      "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.projects.private.read",

      "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.projects.protected.read",

      "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.analytics.read",

      "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.analytics.providers.read",

      "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.tasks.read"

    ],

      "oauth2-configuration": {

          "credential-types": [

               "binding-secret"

              ]

     }

  }

}

always leaves the parameters empty again after saving it. The initial texts taken from examples had some errors that I corrected, but I have currently no idea why the parameter still empty after saving. Any suggestions?

Thank you very much!

Kind Regards

Uwe

entry.title: Re: Unable to find/enter active license key for CAL
entry.content:
Hello John_Pitt,

Please contact us via cal.admin@sap.com e-mail. Then are going to advise you on what additional information you need to provide us with to investigate your case.

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: Approval with reason for closing Open preventive maintenance order
entry.content: Requirement is to get list of open maintenance order and then ask to give reason and give a tentative date by when these orders will be closed/TECO and get approval from manager.How to achieve it ECC system.

entry.title: Re: Is there any resource overview for availability/alloc...
entry.content: Try Workforce Planning, CMP2 and CMP3, that might show PS and PM as long as they are on the same workcenter.  Unfortunately PPM assignments won't be shown there.

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere is coming! Controlled release i
entry.content:
Hi @alexander_john_berlin 

for prerequisite 1.  SAP will take care of that  (upgrade to a new database) 

for prerequisite 2.  it depends - if your SAC and Datasphere are operating in different datacenters (for example EU10 AWS, EU20 Azure, EU30 Google)  then there's a challenge. 

some customers are requesting their SAC be migrated,  or that their Datasphere gets reprovisioned. 

it kind of depends at what stage you are with your deployment, and what is the least disruptive option 

regards, H

entry.title: Re: Actual Costs Not Reflected in Fiori (SAP CPM)
entry.content: Dig into the CPM BADI that calculates the KPI.  There is some CPM configuration around the Cost Elements assigned to Key Figures that needs to be done on the Analytics side.

entry.title: First Half 2025 Release: What's New in SAP SuccessFactors Learning?
entry.content:
The First Half 2025 Release brings a range of exciting enhancements to SAP SuccessFactors Learning. The latest updates lay the foundation for the future of Talent Management with innovative capabilities to drive skills management, learning, and development. Our 1H 2025 Release brings a vastly improved experience for learners and managers alike, all underpinned by an array of AI-powered capabilities.

Here's a quick overview of what's included in this release:

Improved Manager Experience

Building on the new manager view unveiled in our 2H 2024 release, our latest innovations allow managers to easily navigate their reporting hierarchy to view their teams' learning progress as well as encourage developmental learning progress. Managers can also preview and edit notification nudges to their teams when they need some focused attention on overdue learning, increasing manager efficiency and oversight while driving overall compliance adherence.

Hierarchy View

Enhanced Integrated Learning Experience (ILX)

Across recent releases, we’ve continued to evolve the Integrated Learning Experience (ILX), offering learners greater clarity and helping them prioritize what they must, should, and want to learn. With our latest release, we’re excited to announce further enhancements to the Integrated Learning Experience. Surveys have been enabled for end users which allow employees to share their feedback, helping administrators and instructors measure learning effectiveness and improve outcomes.

Optional curricula items are now displayed on the user’s Important Learning section for additional relative learning options they can explore, providing greater discovery to the most relevant material.

Finally, administrators will get the help they need to troubleshoot with Proxy support, allowing them to seamlessly step into users’ views to diagnose and address issues quickly while ensuring timely compliance. 

Optional curricula items

Unleashing the Power of AI

With our custom AI-Assisted Image Generation, employees can now reduce complexity and improve efficiency in finding and creating relevant, contextual and custom images. This will also improve user engagement by capturing their attention using unique, high-quality images rather than generic stock photos. 

We are also thrilled to announce additional Learning capabilities in Joule available with our 1H 2025 release. With Joule, work efficiency can be improved by using conversational language to assist users in knowing the required learning, training, assignment, and timelines. Additionally, administrators can boost compliance rates by delivering quick access to required training, ensuring users stay informed and on track. Approvals are also streamlined with Joule, giving approvers a faster, more efficient way to take action on pending requests, thus improving the user experience. 

AI-Assisted Image generation

Want a First-hand look?

Visit the SAP SuccessFactors 1H 2025 Product Release page to download the full release brochure, overview video featuring Bianka Woelke, and demo highlighting skills focused learning opportunities in the growth portfolio.

entry.title: Re: Runtime engine on Lenel
entry.content:
Moving up from CR 2016 to CR 2020 also changed me from a 32bit environment to a 64bit.

I had been using the Oracle client in 32bit, but now had to configure the Oracle Client 64bit version instead. [the database didn't change]

It is possible that you could change the runtime over to a 64 bit version, or setup a connection to the 64bit version instead of the 32bit version.

Otherwise, CR 2016 may be the answer you are looking for.

entry.title: Re: How to configure monitoring Cloud ALM for I.S and Pos...
entry.content:
Hi, DF10,

All configuration information can be found on Expert Portal at: https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/setup-managed-services.html

Some other resources that may be helpful:

In https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/health-monitoring/health-mon-content.html?anchorId=section, you will find that SAP Integration Suite - Cloud Integration shows Health Monitoring > 

Database ResourcesConnection Usage, Data Storage Usage, Monitoring Storage Usage, Transaction Max. Duration

Supported Solutions: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/supported-solutions -> shows all solutions that are supported and the various use cases that are working with each solution.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: download cluster data
entry.content:
I created 2 programs to download and upload and they worked for a test that I did (I cannot guarantee they will work in all situations so it would be under your responsibility to test them):

REPORT zdownload_pcl4.

DATA: lt_pcl4        TYPE TABLE OF pcl4,
      lv_srtfd       LIKE pcl4-srtfd,
      pptemp         TYPE string,
      msgline        TYPE i,
      my_range       TYPE range of pcl4-srtfd with header line,
      lv_cluster_key TYPE pcl4-relid VALUE 'LA'.

PARAMETERS: p_pernr like pernr-pernr,
            p_path LIKE cffile-filename default 'c:\temp\myfile.txt'.

START-OF-SELECTION.

  lv_srtfd(1) = 'A'.
  lv_srtfd+1(8) = p_pernr.
  lv_srtfd+9(1) = '*'.

  my_range-sign = 'I'.
  my_range-option = 'CP'.
  my_range-low = lv_srtfd.
  append my_range.

  SELECT * FROM pcl4
    INTO TABLE lt_pcl4
      WHERE relid = lv_cluster_key and
            srtfd in my_range.


  IF lt_pcl4 IS NOT INITIAL.

    MOVE p_path TO pptemp.

    CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
      EXPORTING
        filename                = pptemp
        filetype                = 'DAT'
*        codepage                = '1800'
      IMPORTING
        filelength              = msgline
      TABLES
        data_tab                = lt_pcl4
*       FIELDNAMES              =
      EXCEPTIONS
        file_write_error        = 1
        no_batch                = 2
        gui_refuse_filetransfer = 3
        invalid_type            = 4
        no_authority            = 5
        unknown_error           = 6
        header_not_allowed      = 7
        separator_not_allowed   = 8
        filesize_not_allowed    = 9
        header_too_long         = 10
        dp_error_create         = 11
        dp_error_send           = 12
        dp_error_write          = 13
        unknown_dp_error        = 14
        access_denied           = 15
        dp_out_of_memory        = 16
        disk_full               = 17
        dp_timeout              = 18
        file_not_found          = 19
        dataprovider_exception  = 20
        control_flush_error     = 21
        OTHERS                  = 22.

    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
              WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ELSE.
      WRITE: / 'file created'.
    ENDIF.
  ELSE.
    WRITE: / 'no records selected'.
  ENDIF.

REPORT zupload_pcl4.

DATA: lt_pcl4        TYPE TABLE OF pcl4,
      pptemp         TYPE string,
      my_range       TYPE range of pcl4-srtfd with header line.

PARAMETERS: p_path LIKE cffile-filename default 'c:\temp\myfile.txt'.

START-OF-SELECTION.

    MOVE p_path TO pptemp.

    CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_UPLOAD'
      EXPORTING
        filename                = pptemp
        filetype                = 'DAT'
*      IMPORTING
*        filelength              = lv_filelength
*        header                  = lv_headerxstring
      TABLES
        data_tab                = lt_pcl4
      EXCEPTIONS
        file_open_error         = 1
        file_read_error         = 2
        no_batch                = 3
        gui_refuse_filetransfer = 4
        invalid_type            = 5
        no_authority            = 6
        unknown_error           = 7
        bad_data_format         = 8
        header_not_allowed      = 9
        separator_not_allowed   = 10
        header_too_long         = 11
        unknown_dp_error        = 12
        access_denied           = 13
        dp_out_of_memory        = 14
        disk_full               = 15
        dp_timeout              = 16
        OTHERS                  = 17.
    insert pcl4 from table lt_pcl4[] ACCEPTING DUPLICATE KEYS.

entry.title: Re: How can I hide a closed/stopped opportunity from sale...
entry.content: Further to eness' comment, if you do this via adaptation, then you can set the new customer saved query as a default for all users

entry.title: Re: how can we expose Fiori Launchpad shell plugins to SA...
entry.content: Can you elaborate?

entry.title: Error in data action execution
entry.content:
Hi team,

I'm encountering an issue when executing a data action. Whenever I run it for the "Planning" version, I get the following error:

However, this same data action works fine when executed on other versions, such as "Actuals".

Below is the current code of the data action:

 

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %TargetMonth%
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Nivel") = 1 THEN
DATA([d/Measures] = "VB") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "VB") * 1.05
ENDIF
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Nivel") = 2 THEN
DATA([d/Measures] = "VB") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "VB") * 1.04
ENDIF
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Nivel") = 3 THEN
DATA([d/Measures] = "VB") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "VB") * 1.03
ENDIF
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Nivel") = 4 THEN
DATA([d/Measures] = "VB") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "VB") * (1.02)
ENDIF

 

i have the following parameters:

I’m using parameters for both the version and the date (%TargetMonth%). The version is selected by the user before running the action.

Since the logic itself has worked before, I’m not sure if the issue is related to optimization, parameter usage, or something that changed recently.

Could you please advise on what might be causing the error or suggest how to fix it?

Thank you!

Ganjos

entry.title: "Print queue name can't be initial" warning when trying to display document
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

When checking the output of a Sales Document and clicking on 'Display Document' button, a warning dis displayed: "Print queue name can't be initial".
The users then have to click on 'Continue' to skip this warning. Is there a way to not show this warning or proceed automatically?

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: "Print queue name can't be initial" warning when tryi...
entry.content:
Hello,

This warning is displayed because there's no printer set on the output parameter determination. For this warning to not be displayed when clicking on the 'Display Document', it's necessary to configure the printer settings on OPD so the printer can be automatically determined.
Refer to the section 4.1 'Printer Settings' of the Setting Up Output Management (1LQ).

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content: Too bad, so you're in the 1% incompatible. abap2xlsx can read and write an XLSM file with VBA code, see ZCL_EXCEL methods which belong to the interface ZIF_EXCEL_BOOK_VBA_PROJECT. I never tried them. If your Excel file is complex to fill, you may also use the solution demonstrated by zdemo_excel_fill_template.

entry.title: Re: Column editable on Fiori Element List report
entry.content:
Hi @Chamdeep557 

This code is working only for responsible layout not grid layout, How it's going to work with grid layout?

entry.title: SAP S4 Cloud Public in J77 test script, prequisite 6BP test script is missing
entry.content:
We are doing SAP Cloud Public in J77 test script - Advanced Bank Account Management:
4.3. Create In-House Account via eBAM step, there is a prequisite 6BP test script that I have to activate before testing the J77 test script.
However, I can't find the prequisite 6BP - Create via eBAM Integration step in In-House Banking test script.
I have checked on the Internet, on SAP for me portal, among master data scrips, but I didn't find it.
Do you know where can I find the Create via eBAM Integration step in In-House Banking 6BP script? Does it have a new name?
Thank you.

entry.title: HCM Brasil - Crédito do Trabalhador (eConsignado) - Primeira Entrega
entry.content:
Prezados clientes e parceiros,  

Em resposta à promulgação da medida provisória 1.292/2025 pelo governo no dia 12/03/2025, temos o prazer de anunciar a conclusão da primeira entrega do Crédito do Trabalhador.

Continuamos comprometidos em oferecer a melhor experiência e cumprir todas as exigências regulamentares. Para garantir que vocês estejam completamente preparados e em conformidade, realizamos atualizações significativas em nossos sistemas, incluindo novo infotipo, novas rubricas, ajustes na folha de pagamento e no eSocial.

Para facilitar o gerenciamento do programa e atender às mudanças legais requeridas, desenvolvemos e liberamos várias SAP Notes que implementam as funcionalidades necessárias. Detalhamos cada uma delas abaixo para sua referência e ação:

  • 3590652 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3590105 and SAP Note 3582460
  • 3582460 - Infotype 3453 - Payroll Installment Discount
  • 3590105 - HR Renewal - Infotype 3453 - Payroll Installment Discount
  • 3584013 - Payroll installment discount - new wage types
  • 3583606 - BRPID - Payroll installment discount - new payroll function
  • 3597079 - eSocial - Payroll Events - Data Extraction for eConsignado

No dia 05 de Maio realizamos um evento online de 2 horas onde apresentamos a solução do Crédito do Trabalhador, foram apresentados a perspectiva da SAP sobre o novo programa do governo, desde a solicitação do crédito até a operacionalização do desconto em folha com os reflexos no eSocial e FGTS Digital. Ao final realizamos uma sessão de perguntas e respostas. Caso você tenha perdido este evento ou deseja consultar o conteúdo apresentado, você pode acessar o conteúdo da apresentação neste link e o conteúdo da gravação neste link.

Também criamos esta página dedicada para informações sobre o planejamento do Crédito do Trabalhador.

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas.  

Fique à vontade para deixar um feedback, comentário ou pergunta sobre este post no espaço abaixo. Lembre-se de seguir a tag HCM Payroll Brazil na SAP Community para acompanhar as últimas notícias.  

Atenciosamente,

Guilherme Zenzen

entry.title: How to delete null entries/values during calculation in data action in SAC?
entry.content:
In my table, some third measure is getting calculated using two measures where values can be null, 0 or decimal.

Now this third measure is 1st measure * 2nd measure/100. I need to delete rows where third measure is 0 or null. For this i have written - 

IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "thirdmeasure") = 0 OR RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "thirdmeasure") = null THEN
	DELETE()
ENDIF

But this is not deleting the values where both i.e. 1st and 2nd measure are null. What am i doing wrong ?

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM - Integration Monitoring - cant filter out m...
entry.content: Dear Christopher_J, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula Augedahl

entry.title: Export multiple datasphere objects at the same time as JSON file
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to EXPORT multiple datasphere objects simultaneously as a JSON file for backup purposes?

For instance, if I have 10 graphical views on a SERVER, I would like to export all 10 views at once rather than exporting them individually. Is it possible?

Thanks.

Loed

Hi @raphael_walter 

Thanks for the interesting blog!

We have followed this setup, but however there seems to be an issue in replicating the decimals fields from ECC. When replicating it via Data Flows, we immediately see that the decimals are set to 0 and not coming through in Datasphere. This way we miss critical data. Is there some additional configuration necessary for this? 

Thanks!
Lars

Dear @suyoung_choi3,

please check the context Inventory Management: Material Document, especially the following BAdIs:

  • Change Header in Material Documents - MMIM_HEAD_PROVIDE_DATA

best regards,

Marius

There is no dump generated.
The AL11 directory is correct.

entry.title: INCLUDE TYPE not available on S/4 HANA?
entry.content:
I am trying to extend SAPs service consumption models to include navigations in my partner namespace structures. It seems 'INCLUDE TYPE is no longer recognized syntax in S/4 HANA 2023.

After using 'INCLUDE TYPE', a structure literally called 'include' that needs to be referenced as "ls_struct-include-field_name" is created.  

I have imported various API Hub edmx files as service consumption models to create my initial classes. Is there a work around to not having access to the old 'INCLUDE TYPE / INCLUDE STRUCTURE' in recent versions of ABAP cloud?

 

TYPES:
      BEGIN OF tys_product_type,
        product TYPE c LENGTH 40,
        etag TYPE string,
      END OF tys_product_type.

TYPES:
     BEGIN OF tys_extended_product_type,
        product_description        TYPE tyt_product_description_type,
        product_ewmwarehouse       TYPE tyt_product_ewmwarehouse_type,
        INCLUDE TYPE tys_product_type,
     END OF tys_extended_product_type.

----
"Usage
ls_entity_key TYPE tys_extended_product_type
ls_entity_key = VALUE #( include-product  = zif_api_hub~mv_doc_num ).

entry.title: OpenID redirect error when accessing SAP Build Process Automation API from Microsoft Power Apps.
entry.content:
I can instantiate a BPA instance fine using POSTMAN but am having issues doing the same in Microsoft Power Apps (MPA) custom connection.

The MPA connection is setup to call https://ndbs-build.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/authorize  using the client credentials but is returning the following BTP error..

OpenID provider cannot process the request because the redirect_uri does not match the configuration. Please contact your system administrator.

I believe the reason it works in POSTMAN is because there is no redirect url, but in MPA this is enforced as 

https://global.consent.azure-apim.net/redirect/(id).

I've looked into possible resolutions and it looks like I need to include the redirect in BTP like so...

 

"oauth2-configuration": {

"redirect-uris": [

"<MPA Url>"

]

}

However, this is a BPA instance that has it's own uaa, which cannot be edited, so I'm not sure how the redirect-uris can be added.

Another suggestion is to add the redirect uri in Security > Oauth clients, which is not showing. 

Assuming I can get Admin access, what is the correct approach to allow a BPA instance to be called from MPA?

entry.title: Re: Mandatory Fields for CSV Import
entry.content:
Hi @bbknrt ,

When you select the desired entity in "Import Employee Data" page, the mandatory fields are made available on the right side of the field selection panel by default ("Selected Data Fields").

You can check what are the mandatory fields for each entity in "Manage Business Configuration" Page of your instance, which reflects your Data Model Configuration.

For the "Basic Import" File, the mandatory fields for your reference are on below URL, under "SAP SuccessFactors User Data File" section:

Managing the User Data File

Hope this can help you with your doubt.

In case it helped, consider give kudos and mark as solution accepted, so it can help others with the same doubt.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA to Azure data lake connection
entry.content: Is this applicable for on-premise HANA DB ? This is only applicable for BW or for other systems.

entry.title: Re: Replicating table data from an SAP ECC system with SAP Datasphere using Replication Flows
entry.content:
Hello @LCLAEYS ,

Strange indeed. Depending on the target of the replication flow, you might have an option of Clamping decimals, can you verify in your settings at the target level that "Clamp Decimal Floating-Point Data Type" is unchecked? 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/12c45eb2659f4069b29ef4d69bdd9070.html

Let me know if this was it 🙂

Otherwise, what is the target of your replication flow (GCP, etc...) and what table are you replicating?

Best regards,

R.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Action based on Attributes
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I'm currently facing a challenge with generating cost rates and would appreciate your input.

The scenario:

I have actual data that includes both costs and quantities. Using this data, I calculate cost rates through a Data Action. These rates are then multiplied by the forecasted quantities to estimate forecasted costs.

The issue:

In some cases, the forecast includes quantities for certain materials that do not have corresponding values in the actual data. For these cases, I want to apply the average cost rate per Material Group. Each material has a property called Material Group.

My question:

How can I set up a Data Action that calculates the average cost rate per Material Group, so I can use it for materials without actual data and multiply it by their forecasted quantities?

Model setup:

  • One Measure: Amount

  • One Account Dimension: contains both Costs and Quantities

  • Material (Property: Material Group)
  • Customer
  • Further Dimensions

Thank you in advance for your help!

@N1kh1l any ideas?

Kind regards,
Ismail

entry.title: Migration of Control Cycle and Assign bin to PSA in Cloud WM
entry.content:
Hello,

in our Public Cloud Project we activated Scope Item "Warehouse Advanced Production Integration" (6NI) to use Production Material Requests for the production supply. 

Basis for this is the maintenance of master data such as Control Cycle (LPK1) and the Assign Bin to PSA (/SCWM/PSASTAGE2). For the Go-Live we like to migrate this data. Unfortunately we can't find migration objects for this. The migration objects "PP-KAB- Kanban control cycle" and "PP-KAB - Production Supply Area" seem unsuitable for this because we don't use Kanban.

How can we migrate large amounts of data from these objects in the public cloud?

Thank you for your helf!

Best regards, 

Frederik

entry.title: Re: Replicating table data from an SAP ECC system with SAP Datasphere using Replication Flows
entry.content:
Hi @raphael_walter 
Thanks for the fast response.

To give more context on our setup: we replicate it directly in SAP Datasphere itself and do not use Replication Flows but Data Flows instead 😊 
This is the same for any table, but an example is the TCURR table with column UKURST (from 9,5 --> 9,0)

Thanks for any input 🙂 

Kr,

Lars

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA to Azure data lake connection
entry.content: How we can connect to Azure Databricks from an on-premise HANA DB , is it through SAP Cloud Connector or Azure Data Management or any other method ?

entry.title: Update permitted usages - 3 Tier extensibility model
entry.content:
In our S/4 HANA 2023 FPS02 system, INHERITING FROM /iwbep/cl_v4_abs_pm_model_prov is not permitted in tier 1 (ABAP version ABAP CLOUD).

Following SAPs guide on using client proxys in on-premise systems, All of our consumption models for client proxy inherit from this interface. Therefore, all our client proxy classes need to be put into a Tier 2 software component. 

I can see that in BTP ABAP systems, usage of /iwbep/cl_v4_abs_pm_model_prov is allowed. 

So, how do we update our on-premise system to get new permissions on what objects are allowed for use without moving usage into Tier 2 wrappers?

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Quick enablement of SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance with IAG QuickStart Service
entry.content:
Quick enablement of SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance with IAG QuickStart Service

You can streamline access management for both cloud-based and on-premise applications by implementing SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance (IAG) containing Access Analysis Service, Access Request Service, Role Design Service, Access Certification Service and Privileged Access Management Service. The configuration of SAP Cloud IAG can be subdivided in two main parts: basic steps relevant to all customers and steps that include individual settings. SAP Services offers the IAG QuickStart Service to simplify and speed up performance of the first part providing the initial setup and the technical baseline configuration in a short timeframe using SAP Best Practices content. The scope of the service includes the configuration of two target applications (incl. their productive as well as non-productive tenants) and a knowledge transfer session.

How IAG QuickStart Service is performed?

1. Questionnaire

Initially, SAP Services sends to a customer a questionnaire about technical data, required technical users and system hostnames. The information provided will be later used for automatic configuration.

2. Ensure prerequisites

As prerequisites, the customer must provide network configuration and additional configuration required, e.g., SAP Cloud Connector and SAP Cloud Identity Services (SCI). These activities are out of the scope of the IAG QuickStart Service itself. Using SCI with SAP Cloud IAG is mandatory, in case it is not in place yet and the customer doesn’t have resources or knowledge to configure it, SAP Services can support as well with its dedicated SCI service offerings.

3. Automatic and manual SAP Cloud IAG configuration

This stage includes the initial setup and technical baseline configuration, as well as setting up the connection to two target systems. Using scripts allows to significantly reduce time of the basic configuration steps.

SAP Services utilizes those scripts that run on the basis of technical information provided by the customer, aiming to accomplish the following tasks:  

  • Setup of SAP Cloud IAG subaccounts
  • Setup of SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS) standard groups for workflow and authorization purposes
  • Establish trust between SAP Cloud IAG and SAP IAS
  • Setup of SAP Cloud IAG standard destinations
  • Setup of IPS proxy systems
  • Setup of target system destinations for two applications (excluding prerequisite steps in target systems and connectivity). We recommend selecting IAS as one of the two target systems.

4. SAP service incident

SAP Services will create required SAP incidents on customer’s behalf, e.g., to upload SAP standard ruleset to SAP Cloud IAG.

5. Knowledge transfer and hand-over

SAP Services provides a configuration document, conducts a knowledge transfer workshop and hands over the preconfigured solution to the customer.

What is the outcome of the service and further steps?

As a result, the customer obtains a basic configuration that facilitates rapid activation of SAP Cloud IAG such that the customer can focus on configuring the functional aspects. After the service hand over, the customer can configure SAP Cloud IAG functionality according to company needs and test scenarios. Here as well SAP Services can support using their long-lasting SAP Cloud IAG project experience from many other customer projects.

entry.title: While confirming order KO88 inconsistent currency information is occurred how to debug this issue
in S4 Public Cloud- New Column in clear incoming payments (APP)
entry.content:
Hi All,
We have requirement to Add Additional column in the clear incoming payments- App to show Pending Amount for Partially Cleared Documents. 
Can you please help me what are possibilities to full fill the requirement.
-- > Clear incoming payments- My worklist (At Entry Level Screen).

 

Regards,
Sanyasi

entry.title: SAP Comunity Meetup in Recife 2025
entry.content:
CONVITE ESPECIAL – CONFRATERNIZAÇÃO SAP RECIFE 2025

Após todas as emoções, aprendizados e conexões incríveis do SAP Inside Track Recife 2025, é hora de celebrar juntos! 

Convidamos todos os participantes, palestrantes, organizadores e também quem não pôde estar presente no evento durante o dia para se juntar a nós em um Meetup em clima de happy hour – um momento leve, descontraído e com aquele espírito de comunidade que só a galera SAP sabe fazer!

Local: Caldinho do Neném – R. Nogueira de Souza, 375 - Pina, Recife - PE, 51110-110

Logo após o evento – A partir das 19h00

Traga sua energia, sua alegria e venha fazer parte dessa confraternização especial.
Porque a comunidade SAP é feita de pessoas como você que compartilham, ensinam e celebram juntos!

entry.title: Re: SAP PRD QUERY
entry.content:
Hello,

Create a custom field on the item (in the sales documents to store the customer serial), like Z_CUSTOMER_SN.
Create a report that reads this field and brings data on parts sold by machine serial number.

Or simply use IW31
Maintenance order based on list of materials, equipment to which the parts will be assigned (serial number linked to the order)...

Best regards
Daniel Alves Costa

entry.title: Financial plan values transfer from one financial view to another in portfolio bucket
entry.content:
Hi ,

We are trying to transfer values from one financial planning view to another in portfolio bucket.we found an api but that was for fps03 and we are in fps01.can anyone help

Thanks

entry.title: Re: IPS Job finished with error: error=The request to cre...
entry.content:
Hello!

Did you check the IPS properties available for the connectors? I'm not sure what is your target system, but you can check the IPS help page on https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/list-of-properties

There is a parameter called <target system type>.user.unique.attribute. From the description table:

  • Value = emails[0].value. If the service finds an existing user with such email, it updates this user with the data of the conflicting one. If a user with such email is not found, that means the conflict is due to another reason, so the creation of the conflicting user fails.

Cheers!

entry.title: Do you know how to distribute Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions to products using different methods?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Establishing the Product Carbon Footprint with SAP Sustainability Footprint Management learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will explain how to distribute Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions to products using different methods. You will learn how to use the energy flow model and planned consumption rates to distribute scope 1 and 2 emissions, and how to apply further allocation schemes for scope 3 emissions.

Learning objectives
Calculate and allocate Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions from business activities, energy flows, and resources to manufactured products using specified models and production documents.

Prerequisites

  • Establishing Corporate Carbon Footprint Emissions with Simple Configuration
  • Establishing Corporate Carbon Footprint Emissions with Advances Configurations

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Ariba integration With S4 public cloud using MDI
entry.content:

We need to integrate S4 public cloud with Ariba . Is it possible to integrate via Master Data Integration (Orchestration) application and MDI BTP service only or we have  to use CIG "SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network" ?

entry.title: How to solve Partner function is not defined in partner procedure error?
entry.content:
We are getting the error "Partner function XX* is not defined in partner procedure ABC*", how can we solve this?

*Where XX represents the Partner Function ID and ABC represents the partner procedure. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to solve Partner function is not defined in partn...
entry.content:
1. Navigate to the configuration element "Set Up Partner Determination for Sales Document Item" and press Configure  (SSCUI 102971).
  2. Select the Partner Determination Procedure which was mentioned in the error and then open Partner Functions in Procedure.
  3. Press New Entries and add the Partner Function from the error.

entry.title: How to Show All Receipts Across Multiple POS Systems in SAP Customer Checkout
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are working with the following setup:

  • 1 SAP Customer Checkout Manager (CCOM)

  • 2 SAP Customer Checkout POS systems (POS1 and POS2)

  • Central Receipt Management is enabled on all systems

Each POS is properly connected to SAP Customer Checkout Manager. When receipts are posted from POS1 or POS2, they are successfully visible in SAP Customer Checkout Manager (CCOM). However, we are facing an issue:

  • Receipts created on POS1 are not visible on POS2

  • Receipts created on POS2 are not visible on POS1

  • Each POS only shows its locally created receipts

Our goal is to enable each POS to view all receipts, regardless of which POS created them—leveraging the central receipt management if possible.   

How we can achieve to see Receipt in Both POS System

SAP Build SAP Customer Checkout

entry.title: Re: SAP Application for Android/IOS Devices
entry.content:
Hello Muthu,

In a recent client project, I developed several SAPUI5 web applications designed for both PC and mobile usage (notably on Zebra devices). These applications were designed from the outset to work across both types of devices, with particular attention paid to UX and responsiveness.

The approach was to design, develop, and test each feature on both PC and mobile throughout the development cycle, to ensure a smooth and tailored user experience regardless of screen size or device type.

User feedback was very positive, especially regarding ease of use, quick adoption, and consistency across platforms. Choosing a web application also made deployment and maintenance easier, while allowing for scalability.

Depending on the need for native features (offline access, device sensors, etc.), this approach can be a viable alternative to MDK solutions or native applications.

entry.title: GTS best practices to better undertand end to end processes
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am EWM consultant, in EWM we have a best practices material where we can see the end to end process.

Is there any document where I can see the end to end process of order to cash with respect to GTS?

entry.title: Re: DRC - Italy - Official document numbering (ODN)
entry.content: Hello Andreas, I was wondering if you were able to solve this issue of maintain gap less document numbering within the Italian company code without implementing ODN ? I am having an issue understanding how ODN can solve this issue altogethe ; we have mapped BKPF-BELNR and VBRK-VBELN to tag <FatturaElettronicaBody><DatiGenerali><DatiGeneraliDocumento><Numero> so we already have a gapless eDocument list. Our issue however is when an eDocument is rejected or when a wrong posting is made, in this case we get a gap in the numbering transmitted to the SDI.

entry.title: Re: DRC - Italy - Official document numbering (ODN)
entry.content: Hello Andreas and martinlitalin, I was wondering if you were able to solve this issue of maintain gap less document numbering within the Italian company code without implementing ODN ? I am having an issue understanding how ODN can solve this issue altogethe ; we have mapped BKPF-BELNR and VBRK-VBELN to tag <FatturaElettronicaBody><DatiGenerali><DatiGeneraliDocumento><Numero> so we already have a gapless eDocument list. Our issue however is when an eDocument is rejected or when a wrong posting is made, in this case we get a gap in the numbering transmitted to the SDI. Are you in a similar situation ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere News in April
entry.content:
Hi @kpsauer - The Fact replacement in Model is a much awaited feature.

Please improve the screen display on the home page. On my laptop screen there' sonly a single line visible for the artefact list. There should be an option to collapse the Tabs at the top, since it is redundant, and the options to create the artefacts are also available on top of the list anyway

entry.title: Re: IPS Job finished with error: error=The request to cre...
entry.content: Hi CristhianSchaffer,

entry.title: Re: IPS Job finished with error: error=The request to cre...
entry.content: Hi CristhianSchaffer, source system is EntraID and the target system is the local identity Directory. I already add the property "idds.user.automatic.conflict.resolution = true" but it didn't work.

entry.title: Re: Where can managers see SF182 external learnings of em...
entry.content: A manager can either use the approvals dropdown link to see those or via the External Learning requests dropdown link to see those when using new Learning Experience:

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in Central Invoice Management
entry.content: Hi Jeroen, The booster run should have already configured it. Still the same currency conversion error occurs.

entry.title: Hi All, We have scheduled a job with custom report and the runtime was around 40K seconds.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have scheduled a job with custom report and the runtime was around 40K seconds. How can I get the  root cause for longer runtime of the job that was executed few days back. I have check in the job log, but there's no detailed information. Also checked ST03N and couldn't get much information about the root cause. I understand that trace ST05 should be enabled, but its a production system. Is there any other way to find the reason for longer runtime of the job (report is custom - Zreport and assigned with variant). 

Appreciate if anyone help with their inputs.

entry.title: Re: No of container not reflecting in recurring inspection
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing as issue involves Quality Management

entry.title: Re: how can we expose Fiori Launchpad shell plugins to SA...
entry.content: And I thought this was a serious forum

entry.title: Re: Bringing Structure and Guidance to Requirement and Approval Statuses in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Great update, this does provide better governance and control of requirements throughout the lifecycle.

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 Onboarding: Enhancements to the E-Verify Further Action Notice process
entry.content:
Hi Thomas

Thank you for your detailed write-up on this. Can you please clarify the below points?

  • Social Security Number to use to generate this scenario
    • I created a new hire using the format you described, and the E-Verify case successfully closed out without generating a TNC. i made sure the middle numbers were '78' and the 8th number was a value between 1-6. Can you provide additional detail on this step?
  • What are the names of the two new templates that need to be enabled for this process to work?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: No of container not reflecting in recurring inspection
entry.content:
Hello 

 

If you have a requirement to update the number of containers then you should look at using the "manual sample calc." indicator in the 09 inspection type set up for the material.  It will require the user to use 'Manage Inspection lots' app - Change Inspection lot option to update the inspection lot where you can manually enter in the containers and perform the sample calculation when using Recurring Inspections of Batches

 

In S/4HANA Cloud the available BADI's are documented at Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) in Quality Management

 

A suitable BAdIs for the requirement to copy from Batch is currently not available

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere News in April
entry.content:
Thank you for your feedback BenedictV.

There is a customer influence request about this topic, but has very few votes at the moment. Voting for the feature helps us to prioritize.
